markdown:
#  Can I send a bid update email to every vendor/subcontractor? 
##  Answer 
Yes. In the Bidding tool in Procore, an update email is called a _correspondence_. You can send a correspondence to every invited vendor or specialty contractor by creating a new correspondence under the 'Correspondence' subtab of your bid package. In the 'BCC:' section, all of the invited specialty contractors and vendors will be listed automatically. You can also add or delete contacts from the correspondence.
#####  Note
The Correspondence area of the Bidding tool is different than the Correspondence tool in Procore. For information on the Correspondence tool, see Correspondence.
## See Also

title: Can I send a bid update email to every vendor/subcontractor?
description: You can send a bid update email to every vendor and subcontractor in Procore.
